title: ferray-random: multivariate_normal has its own Cholesky — should use ferray-linalg
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

multivariate_normal() in multivariate.rs contains a hand-written cholesky_decompose() function. ferray-linalg already has a Cholesky decomposition backed by faer which is more numerically robust and handles edge cases better. The internal version may also lack error handling for non-positive-definite matrices (NumPy warns or errors via check_valid parameter). Delegate to ferray-linalg::cholesky (adding ferray-linalg as an optional dependency or moving multivariate_normal to ferray-linalg).
